description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear! Product Details Black square toed shoe with slip on styling, has midfoot strap with a velcro closure and rivet details Padded tongue and inner Upper adhered to the outsole Thick TPU outsole with a triangular and oval lugs and a stacked heel  Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
